# hyvui

> Svelte 5 component library. Dark operator aesthetic. 40+ components across primitives, inputs, feedback, layout, navigation, display, ambient, patterns, depth, and scenes. Tokens via CSS custom properties and Tailwind v4 @theme.

## install

```
npm install @hyvnt/hyvui
```

## setup

Import the base stylesheet once in your app entry point:

```js
import '@hyvnt/hyvui/styles.css';
```

Fonts must be loaded by the consuming app:
- ET Book (serif) — self-hosted from https://github.com/edwardtufte/et-book — used for headings and body
- IBM Plex Mono — Google Fonts or self-hosted — used for labels, metadata, UI strings

Use AppShell to handle fonts, register, and vignette automatically:

```svelte
<script>
  import { AppShell } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';
</script>
<AppShell register="mission-control">
  <!-- page content -->
</AppShell>
```

## import pattern

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button, Card, StageScene, toastStore, surface, tokens, themeClasses } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';
</script>
```

## critical rules

- NEVER use hex colors. Use CSS custom properties: `var(--accent)`, `var(--text-soft)`, etc.
- NEVER use Tailwind built-in colors (`text-blue-500`). Use token classes: `text-accent`, `bg-bg`, `border-line`.
- ALWAYS use lowercase for UI strings, labels, button text, copy.
- NEVER use em-dashes. Use commas or periods instead.
- Font weight is almost always 400. Use size, tracking, and color for hierarchy — not weight.
- NEVER use "Error" or "Warning" as title text. Describe the condition: "signal lost", "connection refused".
- No border-radius without intent — the default is no rounding.
- Only two accent hues exist: gold (`--accent: #c79c57`) and teal (`--signal: #79a6a3`). No other hues.

## token classes (Tailwind)

Available via `themeClasses` import or as class strings:

```
Background:  bg-bg, bg-bg-elev
Text:        text-text, text-text-soft, text-muted, text-muted-strong,
             text-accent, text-accent-strong, text-signal
Border:      border-line, border-line-strong
Font:        font-body, font-mono
Shadow:      shadow-veil
Status text: text-status-ok, text-status-pend, text-status-warn, text-status-fail
```

TypeScript reference:

```ts
import { themeClasses } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';
themeClasses.text.accent     // 'text-accent'
themeClasses.bg.elevated     // 'bg-bg-elev'
themeClasses.border.strong   // 'border-line-strong'
```

## token CSS custom properties

```
Color:      --bg, --bg-elev, --text, --text-soft, --muted, --muted-strong,
            --accent, --accent-strong, --signal
Status:     --status-ok, --status-pend, --status-warn, --status-fail
Lines:      --line, --line-strong
Font:       --font-body, --font-mono
Space:      --space-xs, --space-sm, --space-md, --space-lg, --space-xl,
            --space-scene, --space-card, --space-inline
Shadow:     --shadow-veil, --shadow-card
Transition: --transition-smooth, --transition-fast
```

## components

### primitives
- **Text** — typographic element. Props: `as`, `variant` (heading|body|caption|italic), `color`, `expression`.
- **Label** — mono uppercase label. Props: `as`, `color` (muted|accent|signal).
- **Icon** — SVG icon wrapper. Props: `size`, `color`. Pass SVG as children.
- **Divider** — horizontal rule. Props: `strength` (default|strong).
- **Surface** — styled container. Props: `variant` (base|card|panel), `as`, `withInset`.

### inputs
- **Button** — action element. Props: `variant` (primary|secondary|ghost|destructive), `size` (sm|md), `disabled`, `loading`, `echo`, `href`, `type`, `onclick`.
- **Input** — text field. Props: `type`, `value` (bindable), `placeholder`, `disabled`, `error`, `hint`, `label`.
- **Textarea** — multiline field. Props: `value` (bindable), `rows`, `placeholder`, `autoresize`, `disabled`, `error`, `hint`, `label`.
- **Select** — dropdown. Props: `options` [{value, label}], `value` (bindable), `label`, `error`, `disabled`.
- **Checkbox** — checkbox. Props: `checked` (bindable), `label`, `disabled`.
- **Toggle** — boolean switch. Props: `checked` (bindable), `label`, `disabled`.
- **FileUpload** — drag-drop zone. Props: `accept`, `multiple`, `disabled`, `label`, `onfiles`.

### feedback
- **Toast** — notification stack. Place once in layout. Use `toastStore.push(message, variant, duration)`.
- **Alert** — inline persistent message. Props: `variant` (info|warn|error|ok), `title`.
- **Skeleton** — loading placeholder. Props: `width`, `height`, `variant` (text|card|circle|custom).
- **StatusDot** — colored status indicator. Props: `status` (ok|pend|warn|fail), `pulse`, `size`.
- **StatusLine** — terminal-style status row. Props: `status`, `message`, `visible`, `tone` (split|line), `cursor`.
- **EmptyState** — zero-data state. Props: `title`, `description`. children = CTA slot.
- **ErrorState** — failure state. Props: `title`, `description`, `retry`, `onretry`.

### layout
- **Stack** — flexbox wrapper. Props: `direction` (vertical|horizontal), `gap`, `align`, `justify`, `wrap`, `as`.
- **Grid** — responsive/template grid. Props: `mode` (auto|template), `cols`, `minColWidth`, `maxCols`, `gap`, `as`.
- **Card** — surface card. Slots: `header`, `children`, `footer`. Props: `staggerOffset`.
- **Panel** — heavier surface. Props: `withInset`. Slots: `header`, `children`.
- **Modal** — dialog overlay. Props: `open`, `title`, `onclose`. Slots: `header`, `children`, `footer`.
- **Drawer** — slide-in panel. Props: `open`, `side` (left|right), `width`, `onclose`.
- **Popover** — floating element via @floating-ui. Props: `open`, `anchor`, `placement`, `offset`, `portal`, `onclose`.

### navigation
- **Topbar** — sticky header. Slots: `left`, `center`, `right`.
- **SidebarNav** — vertical nav list. Props: `items` [{label, href, active?}], `onnavigate`.
- **Tabs** — tab bar. Props: `tabs` [{id, label}], `active`, `onchange`.
- **Breadcrumb** — trail navigation. Props: `items` [{label, href?}].
- **DropdownMenu** — floating menu. Props: `items` [{label, value, disabled?, destructive?}], `open`, `placement`, `onselect`. Slots: `trigger`.

### display
- **Badge** — inline status chip. Props: `variant` (default|accent|signal|ok|warn|fail).
- **Avatar** — user avatar with initials fallback. Props: `src`, `name`, `size`.
- **Table** — data table. Props: `columns` [{key, label, align?}], `rows` [objects].
- **CodeBlock** — code display with copy. Props: `code`, `language`, `copyable`.
- **MetricCard** — KPI card. Props: `label`, `value`, `trend` (up|down|neutral), `trendValue`.
- **Blockquote** — styled pull quote.

### ambient (all aria-hidden, parent needs position:relative except Vignette)
- **GridOverlay** — faint grid pattern overlay.
- **CornerBrackets** — four-corner bracket decoration. Props: `size`, `color`.
- **ScanBand** — animated scan line. Props: `active`, `axis` (x|y), `size`, `duration`.
- **Vignette** — fixed dark vignette overlay. Place once in layout (or use AppShell).
- **ParallaxLayer** — reads `--px`/`--py` CSS vars for pointer parallax. Props: `strength`.
- **SignalRing** — pulsing sonar rings. Props: `active`, `size`, `color`.
- **GlyphMark** — small SVG glyph. Props: `variant` (cross|reticle|coord|mark), `size`, `color`.
- **DataStream** — scrolling hex char column. Props: `active`, `width`, `speed`.
- **ThreadLine** — SVG line with traveling dot. Props: `x1`, `y1`, `x2`, `y2`, `animated`.

### patterns (pre-wired compositions — check before building from primitives)
- **PageHeader** — title + subtitle + breadcrumb + actions.
- **ConfirmDialog** — Modal pre-wired for confirm/cancel. Props: `open`, `title`, `description`, `confirmLabel`, `cancelLabel`, `destructive`, `onconfirm`, `oncancel`.
- **SearchBar** — Input with loading indicator. Props: `value` (bindable), `placeholder`, `loading`, `onsearch`.
- **ActionBar** — fixed bulk selection bar (renders when count > 0). Props: `count`, `onclear`. Slots: `actions`.
- **TerminalBoot** — orchestrated StatusLine sequence. Props: `lines` [{status, message}], `delay`, `interval`, `instant`, `oncomplete`.

### depth (CSS 3D system)
- **DepthStage** — establishes perspective context. Props: `perspective` (near|mid|far), `originX`, `originY`.
- **DepthLayer** — places content at z-level. Props: `level` (ground|raised|foreground).
- **FloatCard** — pointer-tilt card. Props: `tiltMax`, `elevation` (raised|foreground).
- **HorizonGrid** — canvas perspective grid. Props: `rows`, `cols`, `vanishY`, `animated`.
- **Plinth** — receding surface under floating elements. Props: `width`, `depth`, `color`.

### scenes (full-viewport page templates — always check before building a page layout)
- **StageScene** — centered, theatrical. Use for: hero, landing, feature reveal.
- **NarrativeScene** — asymmetric copy+canvas. Use for: about, portfolio, story.
- **ReadoutScene** — dense, data-forward with optional sidebar. Use for: dashboards, logs.
- **ArchiveScene** — responsive card grid with filter. Use for: galleries, catalogs, indexes.
- **LogScene** — terminal output layout. Use for: boot sequences, build logs, process output.

## scene selection

| need | scene |
|------|-------|
| hero / landing / product reveal | StageScene |
| about / story / feature narrative | NarrativeScene |
| dashboard / data / metrics | ReadoutScene |
| gallery / catalog / index | ArchiveScene |
| boot log / process output | LogScene |

## feedback component decision tree

```
temporary non-blocking notification  →  Toast (toastStore.push)
persistent inline system message     →  Alert
content loading, shape unknown       →  Skeleton
system alive / idle / processing     →  StatusDot
multi-line terminal status           →  StatusLine or TerminalBoot
zero data, no error                  →  EmptyState
request failed                       →  ErrorState
irreversible action confirmation     →  ConfirmDialog
```

## actions

Four composable behaviors. Apply to any element with `use:`.

```svelte
<script>
  import { surface, echo, reveal, resolve } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';
  let resolveAction;
</script>

<!-- entrance animation on mount -->
<div use:surface={{ delay: 100 }}>content appears</div>

<!-- gold pulse on click -->
<button use:echo onclick={submit}>confirm</button>

<!-- reveal hidden content on hover -->
<div use:reveal={{ target: '.meta' }}>
  <span>main content</span>
  <span class="meta">shown on hover</span>
</div>

<!-- status flash on state change — call resolveAction.trigger('ok') or ('fail') -->
<form use:resolve={(a) => resolveAction = a}>...</form>
```

All actions respect `prefers-reduced-motion`.

## registers

Apply to body or any root container. Shifts font weighting and surface density. Non-breaking.

```svelte
<svelte:body data-register="mission-control" />
<!-- or -->
<AppShell register="mission-control">...</AppShell>
<!-- or -->
<script>import { applyRegister } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';</script>
```

| register | character | use for |
|----------|-----------|---------|
| field-notebook | warm, serif-forward, editorial | portfolios, narrative, about |
| mission-control | dense, mono-forward, precise | dashboards, tools, data |
| archive | cool, spacious, muted | galleries, indexes, catalogs |

No register = base styles.

## typographic expressions

Apply to `Text` via the `expression` prop. Declares compositional intent.

| expression | feel | use for |
|------------|------|---------|
| title-card | very large, line-height 0.91, max 10ch | scene-opening headers |
| manifesto | italic, calm, oblique | philosophical statements, pull-quotes |
| readout | mono, subdued | data output, system status text |
| whisper | small, muted, italic | supporting notes, parenthetical |
| command | mono, uppercase, gold | CTAs, action labels |
| chapter | mono, uppercase, line after | section openers, scene numbers |

```svelte
<Text expression="title-card" as="h1">deep signal</Text>
<Text expression="manifesto">a quiet tool for deliberate work.</Text>
<Text expression="readout">sys.uptime: 99.9%</Text>
```

## complete working page example

```svelte
<script lang="ts">
  import {
    AppShell, StageScene, ReadoutScene,
    Text, Label, Button, Stack, Grid,
    MetricCard, StatusDot, GridOverlay,
    toastStore
  } from '@hyvnt/hyvui';
</script>

<AppShell register="mission-control">
  <StageScene>
    {#snippet label()}<Label color="signal">system online</Label>{/snippet}
    {#snippet heading()}
      <Text expression="title-card" as="h1">deep signal</Text>
    {/snippet}
    {#snippet subheading()}
      <Text expression="manifesto">a quiet tool for deliberate work.</Text>
    {/snippet}
    {#snippet actions()}
      <Stack direction="horizontal" gap="0.75rem">
        <Button variant="primary" onclick={() => toastStore.push('welcome', 'ok')}>enter</Button>
        <Button variant="ghost" href="/docs">learn more</Button>
      </Stack>
    {/snippet}
    {#snippet ambient()}<GridOverlay />{/snippet}
  </StageScene>

  <ReadoutScene title="mission status">
    {#snippet header()}
      <StatusDot status="ok" />
      <Label color="signal">all systems nominal</Label>
    {/snippet}
    <Grid minColWidth="14rem" maxCols={4}>
      <MetricCard label="uptime" value="99.9%" trend="up" trendValue="+0.1%" />
      <MetricCard label="active nodes" value="1,284" trend="neutral" />
      <MetricCard label="error rate" value="0.02%" trend="down" trendValue="-0.01%" />
      <MetricCard label="latency" value="12ms" trend="up" />
    </Grid>
  </ReadoutScene>
</AppShell>
```
